name: 16oz Stoneware Neutral Hearts Can Mug White - Spritz™
description:
Sip your favorite drinks in style with the 16oz Stoneware Neutral Hearts Can Mug White from Spritz™. Crafted from durable stoneware, its charming heart design and crisp white finish make it a delightful choice for your drinkware collection. The mug comfortably holds up to 15 ounces, perfect for keeping your beverages warm or cool, whether you're starting your morning or taking a moment to unwind.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
